name: Carla's Lemon Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 0:45
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a large bowl of electric mixer, beat margarine and sugar at medium speed until light and fluffy. Beat in egg at low speed until smooth.
3. Add sour cream, lemon extract, and grated lemon peel to the mixture at low speed until combined.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture, beating until well combined. Form the dough into a ball, wrap it in foil, and refrigerate overnight.
5. Divide the dough into 4 parts. Refrigerate each part until ready to roll out on a floured surface.
6. Roll out one part of dough at a time to about 1/4-inch thickness. Use a cookie cutter or glass to cut out cookies, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
7. Brush the cookies lightly with lemon juice and sprinkle additional sugar for decoration.
8. Bake in a preheated oven set to 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes until golden brown. Do not overcook. Remove cookies from the oven and place on a wire rack to cool completely.
9. Repeat baking process using one part of cookie dough at a time, greasing the pan each time.
